qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql('select PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.E_NUMERO_LEGAJO as CODE, PER01_PERSONAL.D_APE_Y_NOM as TEXT, liq25_personal_liq.oi_personal_liq as ID from PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL, liq25_personal_liq, LIQ07_PERSONAL
JOIN PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.OI_PERSONAL INNER PER01_PERSONAL.OI_PERSONAL, liq07_personal.oi_personal_emp INNER per02_personal_emp.oi_personal_emp, liq25_personal_liq.oi_personal_emp INNER per02_personal_emp.oi_personal_emp WHERE liq25_personal_liq.oi_liquidacion = {#SOURCE:helper-mess/@liq} AND liq25_personal_liq.oi_personal_liq={#SOURCE:helper-mess/@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS2
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql('select PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.E_NUMERO_LEGAJO as CODE, PER01_PERSONAL.D_APE_Y_NOM as TEXT, liq25_personal_liq.oi_personal_liq as ID from PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL, liq25_personal_liq, LIQ07_PERSONAL
JOIN PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.OI_PERSONAL INNER PER01_PERSONAL.OI_PERSONAL, liq07_personal.oi_personal_emp INNER per02_personal_emp.oi_personal_emp, liq25_personal_liq.oi_personal_emp INNER per02_personal_emp.oi_personal_emp
WHERE liq25_personal_liq.oi_liquidacion = {#SOURCE:helper-mess/@liq} AND PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.E_NUMERO_LEGAJO={#SOURCE:helper-mess/@code} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql('select PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.E_NUMERO_LEGAJO as CODE, PER01_PERSONAL.D_APE_Y_NOM as TEXT, liq25_personal_liq.oi_personal_liq as ID from PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL, liq25_personal_liq, LIQ07_PERSONAL
JOIN PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.OI_PERSONAL INNER PER01_PERSONAL.OI_PERSONAL, liq07_personal.oi_personal_emp INNER per02_personal_emp.oi_personal_emp, liq25_personal_liq.oi_personal_emp INNER per02_personal_emp.oi_personal_emp
WHERE liq25_personal_liq.oi_liquidacion = {#SOURCE:helper-mess/@liq} ')/ROWS/ROW
